channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grove Vale (next to Goose Green Primary School) Broken Glass, 23rd April
item.description:
Broken Glass on the pavement needs to be cleared.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van stationery for over 2 months, 23rd April
item.description:
Van is there and hasn't moved in months. Needs to be moved on.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes causing buildings to shake, 23rd April
item.description:
Pot holes are reemerging. When buses go over them nearby buildings shake.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Lawrie Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 23rd April
item.description:
Fly tipping which leads to other people dumping rubbish here. Including people walking

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sofas and beds, 23rd April
item.description:
I have the number plate of a van that had a sofa sticking out of it next to the dumped items
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minnow Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No lighting again whole.street, 23rd April
item.description:
Again the lights are oit this is a weekly thing now. The whole of. Hill View Drive se28 0lj is out possible corners of.High tor and teasel cresent
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hill View Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Open electricity / telecommunications cabinet, 23rd April
item.description:
An open electricity or telecommunications cabinet on the Broadway, opposite the MOT centre. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 206a, Broadway, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Golders Green Hippodrome, 23rd April
item.description:
Graffiti has significantly increased on the Golders Green Hippodrome near the bus stop and railway yards.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 23rd April
item.description:
Street light not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norlands Crescent, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
There are bags of rubbish dumped on the pavement in Colworth Grove again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Browning Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General FLy tipping left next to Bike hangar, 23rd April
item.description:
General Flytiping left next to the bike hanger, there is more just on the other side of the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woolstaplers Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household flytiping, 23rd April
item.description:
Household waste left on green communal area, there is more just behind the corner, next to road works

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rouel Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed bump potholes, 23rd April
item.description:
There are numerous speed bumps on Northumberland Ave Da162qe area most of them have potholes in them resulting in damaging my car tyres. These need to be fixed asap. The potholes are causing damage to my car and most likely other drivers too
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Northumberland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left over from road works, 23rd April
item.description:
After works were carried out, contractors left behind few of their sign equipment, there is also a 'footpath close' sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-90, Woolstaplers Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pink ebike blocking pavement obstruction Brown Hart Gdns, 23rd April
item.description:
Brown Hart Gardens by corner of Lumley Street, pink e-bike lying on its side, blocking the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lumley Street, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone left old fridge on pavement, 23rd April
item.description:
On 22nd April 2026 during the day someone left this old appliance/fridge on the pavement in front of 7 Beaconsfield Road, Mottingham. We did not see this happening, however some neighbours that have camera might be able to help. Kindly ask to collect. Thank you, resident of 7 Beaconsfield Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubish left behind from one of the garage owner, 23rd April
item.description:
Rubbish left behind

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silver Spring Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car for 2 years, 23rd April
item.description:
This car has been abandoned in our car park for 2 years. There has been no movement with the vehicle ever since.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensgate Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue plastic piping foldable chair and a traffic Ballard, 23rd April
item.description:
Been there for awhile

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 191, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In parking bay outside 39 Dartmouth Road, 23rd April
item.description:
Potholes were fixed in nearby roundabout and it looks like the contractors dumped and left this old tarmac and material here. It’s been here for more than a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dartmouth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load
